what_it_does: This file is a metadata stub that records a channel attachment (att-629ee25b) in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, and links it to a board item (item-1fd4cac6) with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
id and channel fields identify the attachment
standouts: Pure metadata record with no prose or code payload
Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference the target board item
notes: A timestamped channel attachment stub that points the dragnet-development channel at board item item-1fd4cac6.
questions: What content or role does board://item-1fd4cac6 represent?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose appears to be linking a channel attachment to a board item, which matches the actual content.
intention_signals: To create a durable, time-stamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for retrieval, provenance, or audit.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item rather than a file path or plain identifier.
contribution: Provides a persistent, time-stamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, supporting lookup and provenance without embedding payload content.
